title: A man reported two previous UFO cases in Itajubá-MG [1990]

text_preview:
Year: 1990.

*Report collected on July 27, 1997. At 19:35.

According to a resident of the Taguatinga Sul region, Distrito Federal, he spotted two unidentified flying objects, round in shape, white, at a speed “faster than a Boeing 737” and emitting a sound that sounded like “sonar noise. “. The sighting lasted about 1 minute and was made with the naked eye and clear sky, from the window of his apartment on the eighth floor of a building. The UFOs, according to the witness, were at a higher altitude than commercial planes and crossed in their trajectories “from south to north and from east to
summary: A Taguatinga Sul resident reported two fast white round UFOs emitting sonar-like noise in 1990; COMDABRA notes also referenced a 1985 spherical object found in Itajubá-MG.
